name: V1 Engine Settings Demo
author: TuneLab Tests
description: Engine-level settings demo: declares IEngineSettings with a plain field, a password (secret) field and a toggle; host renders them in Settings > Plugins, persists per engine, re-feeds via ApplySettings.

zh-CN.name: V1 引擎设置演示
zh-CN.description: 引擎级设置演示：声明 IEngineSettings（普通字段 + 密钥字段 + 开关），宿主在 设置 > 插件 渲染、按引擎落盘、经 ApplySettings 回喂。
